narrative:
Franklin (precinct in Fulton County) has 495 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 40.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 7.3%, a pronounced Republican lean of 33.3 percentage points.
